title: Bad Lands
actors: Robert Barrat, Noah Beery Jr., Guinn 'Big Boy' Williams
plot: A posse of nine and Sheriff Bill Cummings set out after a renegade named Apache Jack, who has murdered the wife of Lopez, one of the posse members. The others are Rayburn, Chic Lyman, Billy Sweet, Bob Mulford, Curley Tom, Eaton, G...
